## 🏢 Company Overview
- Full company name: Kim Ly International Trading and Consulting Private Limited.
- Industry: Trading & consulting, especially on the German - Vietnamese business relations.
- Founding story: Not directly found on the website.
- Our mission is to bridge the gap between Vietnam and Germany in terms of business and education. We aim to help businesses and students alike in order to create long-term, sustainable relationships.
- Our target audience includes entrepreneurs and businesses looking to expand their operations or gain valuable knowledge about the Vietnamese and German markets, and students who wish to continue their education in Germany.

## 📦 Products & Services
- We offer consulting services for both companies and individuals. This includes a wide range of activities from market research, partner search, to trading and representative services.
- We also provide services to students such as university application, visa application, and life support in Germany.
- Our services help various businesses to expand their presence in Vietnam and Germany or individuals to apply to universities in Germany, providing them with the necessary knowledge and support.

## ✨ Key Features & Differentiators
- Our standout feature is the integration of services involving both education and business interests between Vietnam and Germany.
- What sets us apart is our deep understanding and direct communication with the local markets and a wide network in both countries.

## 💰 Pricing
- Not publicly listed. 

## 📞 Contact Information
- Email address: info@kimlyparc.com
- Phone numbers: +49 152 5408 1941, +84 983 015 988

## 📍 Location & Presence
- Headquarters address: 3. OG (3rd floor), Marienstr. 28, 70178 Stuttgart, Germany
- We serve customers both in Vietnam and Germany.
